title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Deloitte India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Deloitte India
jsonLd.description:
Deloitte India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Deloitte India:
Deloitte India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India!
